numeric_policy.child_sequence: model_fsm_axi_decoder_block_fixture called once with start_i held while busy and release-waited

projection_weight_stream_plan.next_memory_agent_scaling_input: use this artifact to scale q_proj-only AXI fixtures to q/k/v/o and MLP projection streams

timing_margin_note: Prior model_fsm_axi_decoder_block_fixture routed timing had WNS 1.089 ns, WHS 0.019 ns, WPWS 2.225 ns, 132 bonded IOB, and status was 64 bits. This board-shell fixture keeps the same compact top-level data/status width and records projection request metadata without exposing AXI data, debug buses, or KV arrays.
verilator_status_policy: Verilator lint result recorded when verification.enable_verilator is true
vivado_timing_status_policy: post-route with non-NA setup/hold/pulse-width when synthesis is enabled
vivado_resource_status_policy: utilization.rpt emitted when Vivado synthesis completes
timing_caveat: Routed timing is bounded fixture timing without DDR controller IP, board I/O delays, or PS/PL integration constraints; it is not board-level ZCU104 signoff.
omitted_operations: board-level timing with package I/O delays
